title: Electro charge
description: adds void sword, void blocks, energy stick, item called gateway to traverse through different dimensions, wings to fly, and void sword right click to explode, and finally, void armor.
body: This project adds some cool features like a explosive void sword some void armor too, and some wings for flight, some things that allow you to traverse through different dimensions and a energy stick that summons light and explodes mobs when you hit them.
